title.ja: OpenAI Codex のインストール

description: Install the OpenAI Codex CLI, sign in, start a first local coding session, and see how this site can import a real Codex session log as tutorial input. The final trace block is generated from a Codex session recorded in the local `demo2` folder.
requirements:
- macOS or Linux terminal
- Node.js/npm available on your machine
- An OpenAI account for authentication
- A project folder where you want Codex to work
